attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ST.HEADER_REQUEST_ID, 
ST.HEADER_GUIDANCE_ID,
ST.LINE_REQUEST_ID,
ST.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID, 
ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, 
ST.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, 
ST.GUIDANCE_LEVEL, 
ST.PRIMARY_PRODUCT_FAMILY, 
ST.ORIGINAL_PRODUCT_FAMILY, 
ST.LINE_OBJECT_ID, 
ST.LINE_TYPE_ID, 
ST.PART_NUMBER, 
ST.REQUESTED_DISCOUNT, 
ST.GUIDANCE_DISCOUNT, 
ST.DISCOUNT_DISCRETION,
 ST.IS_FINAL, 
 ST.IN_SALES_DASHBOARD, 
 ST.UPDATED_BY, 
 ST.UPDATED_ON ,
 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
/****Added below columns as part of EPS HANA DATA FOUNDATION project****/
ST.STATUS,
ST.APPROVER_ROLE,
ST.BAND,
ST.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE,
ST.RECOMMENDATION,
ST.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_PCT,
ST.BAROMETER_NEEDLE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_XXSDG_QUOTE_LINE_GUIDANCE_V ST
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQ
					WHERE NDQ.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT = ST.LINE_OBJECT_ID)

SELECT EX.HEADER_REQUEST_ID, 
EX.HEADER_GUIDANCE_ID,
EX.LINE_REQUEST_ID, 
EX.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID,
EX.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, 
EX.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, 
EX.GUIDANCE_LEVEL, 
EX.PRIMARY_PRODUCT_FAMILY, 
EX.ORIGINAL_PRODUCT_FAMILY, 
EX.LINE_OBJECT_ID, 
EX.LINE_TYPE_ID, 
EX.PART_NUMBER, 
EX.REQUESTED_DISCOUNT, 
EX.GUIDANCE_DISCOUNT, 
EX.DISCOUNT_DISCRETION, 
EX.IS_FINAL, 
EX.IN_SALES_DASHBOARD, 
EX.UPDATED_BY, 
EX.UPDATED_ON ,
/****Added below columns as part of EPS HANA DATA FOUNDATION project****/
EX.STATUS,
EX.APPROVER_ROLE,
EX.BAND,
EX.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE,
EX.RECOMMENDATION,
EX.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_PCT,
EX.BAROMETER_NEEDLE
FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXSDG_QUOTE_LINE_GUIDANCE_V EX
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXSDG_QUOTE_LINE_GUIDANCE_V ST
					WHERE ST.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID = EX.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID
AND ST.LINE_OBJECT_ID = EX.LINE_OBJECT_ID)

SELECT
COALESCE(NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,-999) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
QLG.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID AS BK_DETAIL_GUIDANCE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(QLG.GUIDANCE_LEVEL,'UN KNOWN') AS GUIDANCE_LEVEL_CD,
COALESCE(QLG.REQUESTED_DISCOUNT,0) AS REQUESTED_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(QLG.GUIDANCE_DISCOUNT,0) AS GUIDANCE_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(QLG.DISCOUNT_DISCRETION,0) AS DISCOUNT_DISCRETION_PCT,
COALESCE(QLG.IS_FINAL,'N') AS IS_FINALIZED_FLG,
COALESCE(QLG.IN_SALES_DASHBOARD,'N') AS IN_SALES_DASHBOARD_FLG,
COALESCE(QLG.PRIMARY_PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNK') AS SRC_RPRTD_PRIMARY_PRDT_FMLY_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(QLG.STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS DTL_STATUS_CD,
QLG.APPROVER_ROLE AS  DTL_APPROVER_ROLE_NAME,
QLG.BAND AS DTL_BAND_LEVEL_DSCRTN_PCT,
QLG.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE AS DTL_BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_AMT,
QLG.RECOMMENDATION AS DTL_DSCNT_GDNC_RCMNDTN_PCT,
QLG.BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_PCT AS DTL_BOOKINGS_UPSIDE_PCT,
COALESCE(SKU.CMRS_MAJOR_PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN') AS CMRS_MAJOR_PRDT_FAMILY_ID,
QLG.BAROMETER_NEEDLE AS DTL_BAROMETER_NEEDLE_PCT,
COALESCE(QLG.LINE_REQUEST_ID,-999) AS SK_REQUEST_ID_INT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXSDG_QUOTE_LINE_GUIDANCE_V  QLG
/*INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL
ON NDQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT = QLG.LINE_OBJECT_ID*/
LEFT  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXSDG_GUIDANCE_PF_SKU_MAP  SKU
ON QLG.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID=SKU.GUIDANCE_ID
AND QLG.LINE_OBJECT_ID=SKU.LINE_OBJECT_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL
 ON NDQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT  = QLG.LINE_OBJECT_ID
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (  PARTITION BY QLG. LINE_OBJECT_ID ,QLG.LINE_GUIDANCE_ID  ORDER BY QLG.UPDATED_ON desc)=1
